deploy.startCommand: cd backend && python manage.py migrate && python manage.py shell -c "from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model; U=get_user_model(); u=U.objects.filter(username='admin').first(); u and u.set_password('Admin@1234') or U.objects.create_superuser('admin','admin@hrms.com','Admin@1234'); u2=U.objects.get(username='admin'); u2.is_staff=True; u2.is_superuser=True; u2.is_active=True; u2.save()" && gunicorn hrms.wsgi --bind 0.0.0.0:${PORT:-8000} --workers 2
